title: Montana Association of Disability Examiners (MONTADE) — Constitution
description: Governing constitution of the Montana Association of Disability Examiners (MONTADE), a chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE). Covers name, purpose, NADE affiliation, definitions, membership (full and associate), by-laws authorization, officers (President, President-Elect, Secretary-Treasurer), the Executive Board, meetings (monthly), amendments, and tax-exempt limitations. Revised and adopted May 1985.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Montana Chapter (MONTADE)
source.title: Constitution of the Montana Association of Disability Examiners (MONTADE)

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source file 'Montana-Const-Bylaws.doc' (in the same directory); markdown formatting was machine-derived and some list numbering / a trailing block of regional-style amendment text appear as OCR/conversion artifacts but were preserved as-converted. Document closes 'Revised and adopted May, 1985', captured as temporal_coverage. The file is the chapter Constitution (the by-laws proper are authorized but not separately reproduced here). NADE url is the organization site, not a deep link to this document.
